"'''Kashyyyk in Flames'''" is a [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] Adventure published in [[Star Wars Gamer 4|''Star Wars Gamer'' 4]]. It was written by [[J.D. Wiker]] and illustrated by [[Joe Corroney]].
